creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
this bite my ass again with protobuf-29.3

now i have some ports in half-cocked state i'm afraid

noone bumped portrevision of abseil nor did add any updating entry or no mention in ports commit logs even so i battled for days and almost wanted to rebuild abseil already as it looked like only culprit

hopefully we don't get third mistake?

it also affects some clangs i read. i'm on 13.4 and something is installed from ports too so who knows!

maybe it needs bumps for this short build so it fixes it for everyone?
